evals.name: setup-local-development
evals.prompt: I want to set up Sandbox Agent for local development to orchestrate Claude Code. How do I install and run the server locally?
evals.expected_output: Instructions for installing and starting the sandbox-agent server locally with proper configuration

assertions.name: mentions_install_command
assertions.description: Provides install command (npx, npm, curl, etc)

evals.name: create-session-typescript
evals.prompt: I have the Sandbox Agent server running. Now I need to create a TypeScript SDK client, start a Claude session, and send it a prompt. Can you show me the code?
evals.expected_output: TypeScript code showing SDK connection, session creation, and prompt sending

evals.name: deploy-to-e2b
evals.prompt: I want to deploy Sandbox Agent to E2B so I can run Claude Code in a sandboxed environment. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: E2B deployment instructions including environment variables and sandbox configuration

assertions.name: mentions_env_vars
assertions.description: Shows how to pass environment variables
